title: Warium Extras
description: Brings extra detail to your gameplay
body:
Warium Extras is an addon for Warium that adds more blocks and items for your (vehicle) builds!

Level up your vehicles with Warium Extras!

warium likes to stay away from the create mod-becuase it is not for the create mod-so this mod brings some detailing blocks that take inspiration from copycats.. such as layers and lifted layers and lots of other stuff-download now to find out!

some of these blocks include
aluminum layer/dark gray/all colors
aluminum lifted layer/dark gray
steel layer/all colors
steel lifted layer
tinted glass stair stack
tinted glass lifted layer
tinted glass raised layer
tinted glass panel
and some more aluminum things but listed above are the most used

this mod makes your warium/valkyrien warium vehicles have great detail!
make sure to check out my other mods here and on curseforge!

this mod is only for forge 1.20.1
